features: Natural & Unrefined: Crafted from unbleached, additive-free fibers, these papers offer a pure and authentic smoking experience. ​
Ultra-Thin Design: Each paper measures 110mm x 44mm, ensuring a slow, even burn that enhances flavor without overpowering. ​
Criss-Cross Watermark: Patented watermark prevents runs and maintains a consistent burn throughout. ​
Vegan & Eco-Friendly: Made with natural hemp gum and produced using windmill-powered energy, aligning with sustainable practices. ​
description: Product Description Experience a superior rolling session with the RAW Classic King Size Slim Rolling Papers – Box of 50 Packs. Each paper is meticulously crafted from unbleached, additive-free fibers, ensuring a clean and authentic taste. The ultra-thin design promotes a slow, even burn, allowing the true flavor of your material to shine through. Enhanced with RAW's patented criss-cross watermark, these papers prevent runs and maintain consistency. Committed to sustainability, RAW utilizes natural hemp gum and windmill-powered production methods. This bulk pack contains 50 booklets, each with 32 leaves, totaling 1,600 papers—perfect for enthusiasts seeking quality and value.​ Box Contains Raw Kingsize Slim
